evals.prompt: check for new papers on quantum chemistry and density functional theory since 2026-05-14, threshold 3, dry run mode — don't write anything to disk
evals.expected_output: Prints summary of what would be reported (paper count, scores). States dry-run mode. No digest .md file written to inbox. No state file modified.

assertions.text: output mentions dry run (no files written)
assertions.check: stdout or run_log.txt contains 'dry run' or 'Dry run' (case-insensitive)

assertions.text: no digest file written to disk
assertions.check: no lit-watch-*.md file created in vault inbox or cwd
stdout or run_log.txt contains 'Scanned' or 'scanned' or 'papers' with a number

evals.prompt: run lit-watch for machine learning molecular property prediction papers since 2026-05-15, threshold 3, save digest to /tmp/lit-watch-eval1-inbox/
evals.expected_output: Digest .md written to /tmp/lit-watch-eval1-inbox/. Digest contains header line with Period, Sources searched coverage statement, and relevance-scored papers section.

assertions.text: digest .md file written to output dir
digest contains relevance section or no-papers message
assertions.check: digest contains '## High-relevance' or 'No papers above threshold' or 'below threshold'

evals.expected_output: State file created at /tmp/lit-watch-state-eval2/lit-watch-state.json with last_run set to today. Digest or no-papers message written to /tmp/lit-watch-eval2-inbox/.

assertions.text: state file created with last_run = today
digest or no-papers output written to inbox dir
assertions.check: lit-watch-*.md exists in /tmp/lit-watch-eval2-inbox/ OR run_log.txt mentions 'No papers above threshold'
